data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and project docs for review decision gate changes
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update project documentation to reflect all review decision gate changes from this epic:
1. CLAUDE.md: Document ESCALATE_REVIEW signal, one-way ratchet behavior, fragile severity semantics, approach_viability_concern signal, classifier external-API floor rule
2. CLAUDE.md: Update agent routing table with new signals and dispatch behaviors
3. Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions

Unit test exemption: Documentation-only changes with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents fragile severity
  Verify: grep -q 'fragile' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents ESCALATE_REVIEW
  Verify: grep -qi 'ESCALATE_REVIEW\|escalate_review' CLAUDE.md
